refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for each phase of the load→travel→dump cycle to meet or exceed the customer-defined cycle time target.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the overall cycle time KPI into sub-functions aligned with each phase of the cycle enables targeted design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time for load, travel, and dump phases separately under representative duty cycles and site conditions; verify combined cycle time meets CT_target.

candidate_dps: Optimize load phase operations via automation and efficient tooling
Optimize travel phase via route planning and vehicle speed control
Optimize dump phase via automated positioning and unloading mechanisms
selected_dp.selected_dp: Optimize load phase operations via automation and efficient tooling; Optimize travel phase via route planning and vehicle speed control; Optimize dump phase via automated positioning and unloading mechanisms

potential_sources: Interdependency between phases due to timing and resource constraints
Data sharing for cycle phase transitions
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically separable by cycle phase but require coordination; coupling is manageable with clear interfaces.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate site and vehicle telemetry data
Risk of suboptimal coordination causing cycle time delays
High safety criticality requires fail-safe automation
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit coordination DP or interface to manage phase transitions and timing dependencies.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level coordination and optimization of cycle phases

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receive vehicle and site data; send performance metrics

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Issue commands to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for phase execution

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Receive safety status and alerts from Safety Services

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communicate with remote modules and tele-operator

module_containment_scores.notes: Central coordination logic contained here; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle executes commands but does not coordinate cycle phases.
Teleoperation supports manual override but not cycle optimization.
Safety services provide alerts but do not control cycle timing.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing cycle time optimization logic in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex
Interface latency with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules could impact cycle timing
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth in NGHE Solution; consider modularizing cycle phase controllers if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes cycle time KPI into manageable sub-functions; selected DPs logically address each sub-FR with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized DP implementation in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as appropriate IM boundary for cycle time optimization.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry and performance metrics is feasible at NGHE Solution level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of cycle time optimization to NGHE Solution module with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Add explicit coordination DP/interface for phase transitions
Plan for scalability of NGHE Solution module to avoid complexity bottlenecks

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and assignments meet criteria for clarity, containment, and verification feasibility; no immediate need to zigzag or revise.

revise.why: Consider adding explicit coordination DP to manage phase transitions and timing dependencies.

open_risks: Complexity growth in NGHE Solution module
Latency in interfaces impacting cycle time
evidence_needed: Performance data from prototype NGHE Solution module
